mapper.select: SELECT cl.CLASS_SN AS classSn, cl.CLASS_NM AS classNm, c.COURSE_NM AS courseNm, c.COURSE_SN AS courseSn, cl.CLASS_STAT_CD AS classStatCd, cl.ENRL_STRT_YMD AS enrlStrtYmd, cl.ENRL_END_YMD AS enrlEndYmd, NVL(s.TOTAL_STUDENTS, 0) AS totalStudents, NVL(s.ACTIVE_STUDENTS, 0) AS activeStudents, NVL(s.COMPLETED_STUDENTS, 0) AS completedStudents, NVL(lect.TOTAL_LECTURES, 0) AS totalLectures, CASE WHEN NVL(s.TOTAL_STUDENTS, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(NVL(s.COMPLETED_STUDENTS, 0) * 100.0 / s.TOTAL_STUDENTS, 1) END AS completionRate, CASE WHEN NVL(s.TOTAL_STUDENTS, 0) = 0 OR NVL(lect.TOTAL_LECTURES, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND( NVL(prog.TOTAL_COMPLETED, 0) * 100.0 / (s.TOTAL_STUDENTS * lect.TOTAL_LECTURES), 1 ) END AS avgProgressRate FROM CLASSROOM cl JOIN COURSE c ON cl.COURSE_SN = c.COURSE_SN LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CLASS_SN, COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_STUDENTS, SUM(CASE WHEN ENRL_STAT_CD = 'ENROLLED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ACTIVE_STUDENTS, SUM(CASE WHEN ENRL_STAT_CD = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS COMPLETED_STUDENTS FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER WHERE ENRL_STAT_CD IN ('ENROLLED', 'COMPLETED') GROUP BY CLASS_SN ) s ON cl.CLASS_SN = s.CLASS_SN LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COURSE_SN, COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_LECTURES FROM LECTURE WHERE OPNN_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY COURSE_SN ) lect ON c.COURSE_SN = lect.COURSE_SN LEFT JOIN ( SELECT scp.CLASS_SN, COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_COMPLETED FROM STUDENT_CONTENT_PROGRESS scp JOIN CLASSROOM_MEMBER cm ON scp.CLASS_SN = cm.CLASS_SN AND scp.USER_ID = cm.USER_ID AND cm.ENRL_STAT_CD IN ('ENROLLED', 'COMPLETED') WHERE scp.CMPL_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY scp.CLASS_SN ) prog ON cl.CLASS_SN = prog.CLASS_SN WHERE c.INSTR_USER_ID = #{instrUserId} ORDER BY cl.CLASS_SN DESC
